title: celtis angustifolia
intro: Celtis angustifolia, also known as the silver buffalo berry or narrow-leafed hackberry, is a shrub or small tree native to North America. Its medicinal properties include the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Celtis angustifolia include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
